scenario.name: VOS-RS REGISTER benchmark
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:127.0.0.1:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: "[service]" <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]reg[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@127.0.0.1:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
